message:
feat(fcp-store): Add real-component integration tests for store + repair pipeline

Eight integration tests covering the full encode → store → partial loss →
coverage evaluation → repair → reconstruct pipeline using real RaptorQ
encoding/decoding and real MemorySymbolStore/MemoryObjectStore (no mocks):

- encode_store_reconstruct: Full roundtrip via symbol store
- partial_loss_degrades_coverage: Coverage evaluation after symbol deletion
- partial_loss_repair_reconstruct: Loss → repair symbol addition → reconstruct
- repair_controller_drives_convergence: RepairController queue/convergence loop
- object_and_symbol_stores_coherent: Both stores working together
- multi_node_symbol_distribution: Round-robin placement across 3 nodes
- reconstruct_from_repair_symbols_only: Fountain code property validation
- oti_roundtrip_fidelity: OTI serialization lossless round-trip

Closes bd-2nsf

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
